title: porter.toml
description: Per-repo configuration for the porter release tool.

directory.description: Directory holding pending changeset Markdown files.

group.description: Release lines. Each group is a set of components pinned to one shared version, with its own changelog and tags.

name.description: Unique group name; named by changesets' `groups:` frontmatter.

changelog.description: Changelog this group prepends to. Defaults to [release].changelog.

components.description: The things that move together in this group.

registries.description: Named publish targets an artifact's `registry` field can reference by name.

signing.description: Cosign signing for signable artifacts (oci-image, helm-chart, cli-binary). Opt-in: an absent block means releases are NOT signed. Adding the block (empty is enough) turns on keyless Sigstore. Set backend to "none" to keep the block while disabling.

backend.description: "sigstore" signs keyless via Fulcio/Rekor using the CI OIDC token; "none" disables signing.

fulcio_url.description: Fulcio CA endpoint. Override only for a private Sigstore instance.

rekor_url.description: Rekor transparency log endpoint. Override only for a private Sigstore instance.

layout.description: Path to an in-toto v1 layout file.

changelog.description: Default changelog for groups that don't set their own.

version_pr_title.description: Template for the rolling Version PR title (and its branch commit). The {version} placeholder is filled when a single group bumps. Set to e.g. "chore(release): {version}" for a Conventional Commits subject.

component.description: A versioned thing: a version source, an artifact, or both. The id is its identity and tag stem.

id.description: Unique component id (repo-wide). Names the artifact and is the stem of its tag.

type.description: Version source kind. Omit for an artifact-only component (tagged at its group's version).

pattern.description: For type=regex: a regex with a named capture group `(?P<version>...)`.

update_app_version.description: For type=helm-chart: also update the chart's `appVersion`.

tag_prefix.description: Overrides the default `<id>/v` tag stem (e.g. "v" for bare vX.Y.Z).

registry.description: A [registries] name, or a bare image repo URL.
A [registries] name, or a bare oci:// URL.

kind.description: Must match the artifact kind that references it (oci-image→oci, helm-chart→oci-helm, npm-package→npm).

auth.description: How CI authenticates to the registry. basic/token reference secret names read from a single `registry-auth` JSON secret; aws-ecr uses GitHub OIDC and takes plain role_arn/region (not secrets).

username_secret.description: For type=basic: secret name of the username.

password_secret.description: For type=basic: secret name of the password.

token_secret.description: For type=token: secret name of the bearer token.

role_arn.description: For type=aws-ecr: IAM role ARN to assume via GitHub OIDC (a plain value, not a secret).

region.description: For type=aws-ecr: AWS region of the ECR registry.
